settings.notes: Monthly income target for Pipeline Hub

jd_master.notes: Sample JD added for Check JD testing. All manager fields are filled so the full flow can be tested.
jd_master.message_template: Hi {candidate_name}, sharing the {jd_name} role from {company}. Location: {location}. Salary: 18k to 24k in hand. Reply Interested to continue.
jd_master.instruction_points: [{"title": "Instruction 1", "content": "Open with company, salary, and work location in the first 20 seconds."}, {"title": "Instruction 2", "content": "Confirm candidate comfort for support profile, rotational shift, and basic calling tasks."}, {"title": "Instruction 3", "content": "Check graduation status, communication level, and expected in hand salary."}, {"title": "Instruction 4", "content": "Close the call with next step, document request, and WhatsApp confirmation line."}]
jd_master.send_items: [{"order_no": 1, "label": "Location Details", "message": "Office location: Noida Sector 62. Reporting timing and nearest landmark can be shared from this block.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 2, "label": "JD Summary", "message": "Role: Support Executive. Handle candidate support calls, basic screening, update CRM, and coordinate next steps.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 3, "label": "Interview Flow", "message": "Round 1 HR screening, Round 2 Ops discussion, same day closure when profile is strong.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 4, "label": "Training Video", "message": "Use this sample recruitment training video while testing the material and WhatsApp buttons.", "link": "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5412xgtPnv4"}]

jd_master.notes: Sample sales JD for testing matched cards, WhatsApp text, and material blocks.
jd_master.message_template: Hi {candidate_name}, this is the {jd_name} update from {company}. Gurgaon based profile, 22k to 28k in hand plus incentive. Reply if you want interview details.
jd_master.instruction_points: [{"title": "Instruction 1", "content": "Pitch incentive structure first and keep the opener sharp."}, {"title": "Instruction 2", "content": "Check cold calling comfort, sales exposure, and clear communication confidence."}, {"title": "Instruction 3", "content": "Confirm Gurgaon reporting flexibility and immediate joiner status."}, {"title": "Instruction 4", "content": "Send sales script practice link after the call if the candidate sounds positive."}]
jd_master.send_items: [{"order_no": 1, "label": "Role Details", "message": "Role: Sales Associate. Lead follow up, calling, pitch explanation, and candidate conversion support.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 2, "label": "Salary and Shift", "message": "Salary range 22k to 28k. Day shift. Performance incentive discussed in final round.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 3, "label": "Interview Process", "message": "One telephonic round and one final discussion. Faster closure for relevant sales profiles.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 4, "label": "Sales Video", "message": "Use this sample sales video while testing the training material block.", "link": "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=q0NAmVBy6uI"}]

jd_master.notes: Back office sample card for testing process based JD filtering.
jd_master.message_template: Hi {candidate_name}, sharing the {jd_name} opening. Gurgaon based back office profile, 17k to 23k in hand. Please review and confirm interest.
jd_master.instruction_points: [{"title": "Instruction 1", "content": "Explain this is a back office profile with data handling, form checking, and CRM update work."}, {"title": "Instruction 2", "content": "Check typing comfort, documentation readiness, and office reporting comfort."}, {"title": "Instruction 3", "content": "Keep the script simple for fresher candidates and explain growth path clearly."}, {"title": "Instruction 4", "content": "Share the sample PDF and interview checklist before ending the call."}]
jd_master.send_items: [{"order_no": 1, "label": "Work Profile", "message": "Back office operations, CRM updates, excel support, and document verification tasks.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 2, "label": "Documents Checklist", "message": "Keep Aadhaar, PAN, updated resume, and one passport photo ready for faster closure.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 3, "label": "Interview Process", "message": "Initial screening followed by operations discussion and final HR confirmation.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 4, "label": "Recruitment Video", "message": "Use this link to test YouTube material sharing from the JD centre.", "link": "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=20TOjxiNppk"}]

jd_master.notes: Regional language support sample JD with full send materials for WhatsApp testing.
jd_master.message_template: Hi {candidate_name}, sharing the {jd_name} opening from {company}. Noida based profile, 16k to 22k in hand. Let me know if I should line up the interview.
jd_master.instruction_points: [{"title": "Instruction 1", "content": "Check communication fluency and comfort in a regional support environment."}, {"title": "Instruction 2", "content": "Explain customer support nature, shift flexibility, and process training period."}, {"title": "Instruction 3", "content": "Verify documents, location comfort, and expected joining date."}, {"title": "Instruction 4", "content": "Send support script and material pack right after the candidate confirms interest."}]
jd_master.send_items: [{"order_no": 1, "label": "Shift Details", "message": "Rotational shift support environment with proper process training before live work.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 2, "label": "Role Summary", "message": "Handle customer support, regional language communication, CRM notes, and escalation follow up.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 3, "label": "Interview Flow", "message": "Language screening, support round, and final confirmation.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 4, "label": "Cold Calling Video", "message": "Use this sample video to test external material sharing.", "link": "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5tJtHLKyjYY"}]

jd_master.notes: Banking process sample with fully filled instructions, message template, and material links.
jd_master.message_template: Hi {candidate_name}, sharing the {jd_name} profile from {company}. Gurgaon based banking support role, 21k to 32k in hand. Reply Interested for interview details.
jd_master.instruction_points: [{"title": "Instruction 1", "content": "Keep the opener formal and mention banking process credibility quickly."}, {"title": "Instruction 2", "content": "Check candidate communication, customer handling, and basic banking comfort."}, {"title": "Instruction 3", "content": "Confirm location, salary expectation, and documentation status."}, {"title": "Instruction 4", "content": "End the call with interview slot note and WhatsApp message confirmation."}]
jd_master.send_items: [{"order_no": 1, "label": "Role Snapshot", "message": "Customer handling, relationship support, service follow up, and process notes update.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 2, "label": "Salary and Benefits", "message": "In hand salary 21k to 32k depending on profile fit and process round performance.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 3, "label": "Documents and Joining", "message": "Keep KYC documents, updated resume, and latest salary proof if experienced.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 4, "label": "Interview Basics Video", "message": "Use this interview video link while checking the material action buttons.", "link": "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=00w_O1E2cX8"}]

jd_master.notes: Extra support JD added so the sample candidate opens multiple matching JDs from Check JD.
jd_master.message_template: Hi {candidate_name}, sharing the {jd_name} role from {company}. Noida location, 15k to 21k in hand. Reply if you want the interview details.
jd_master.instruction_points: [{"title": "Instruction 1", "content": "Use a simple opener and say this is a customer support plus CRM update profile."}, {"title": "Instruction 2", "content": "Check communication clarity, basic computer comfort, and immediate availability."}, {"title": "Instruction 3", "content": "Confirm Noida location comfort and salary expectation before pitching the next step."}, {"title": "Instruction 4", "content": "Send WhatsApp details right after interest confirmation so the sample flow can be tested."}]
jd_master.send_items: [{"order_no": 1, "label": "Role Summary", "message": "Customer support profile with CRM update work, basic issue handling, and candidate coordination.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 2, "label": "Location Note", "message": "Office location is Noida. Nearest landmark and reporting time can be shared from this block.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 3, "label": "Interview Steps", "message": "HR screening followed by operations discussion and same day closure for strong profiles.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 4, "label": "Support Training Video", "message": "Use this training link while testing JD Centre material buttons.", "link": "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5412xgtPnv4"}]

jd_master.notes: Extra voice support JD for Check JD popup testing with the same sample candidate.
jd_master.message_template: Hi {candidate_name}, this is the {jd_name} role from {company}. Noida based voice support profile, 16k to 22k in hand. Let me know if you want to continue.
jd_master.instruction_points: [{"title": "Instruction 1", "content": "Explain the voice support nature clearly and keep the pitch short."}, {"title": "Instruction 2", "content": "Check average to good communication and comfort handling customer calls."}, {"title": "Instruction 3", "content": "Confirm location, document status, and joining timeline."}, {"title": "Instruction 4", "content": "Use the WhatsApp template and material block so the full sample flow can be tested."}]
jd_master.send_items: [{"order_no": 1, "label": "Role Details", "message": "Voice support, customer interaction, CRM note update, and basic escalation handling.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 2, "label": "Shift and Salary", "message": "Salary 16k to 22k in hand. Rotational shift process with training support.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 3, "label": "Interview Process", "message": "Screening, communication round, and final discussion.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 4, "label": "Cold Calling Video", "message": "Sample video for external material sharing test.", "link": "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5tJtHLKyjYY"}]

jd_master.notes: Extra chat support JD so Check JD opens 3 to 4 aligned results for the sample candidate.
jd_master.message_template: Hi {candidate_name}, sharing the {jd_name} role from {company}. Gurgaon based chat support profile, 15.5k to 21.5k in hand. Reply if interested.
jd_master.instruction_points: [{"title": "Instruction 1", "content": "Pitch this as chat plus email support with CRM update work."}, {"title": "Instruction 2", "content": "Check typing comfort, basic English reading, and immediate availability."}, {"title": "Instruction 3", "content": "Confirm Gurgaon or Noida travel comfort depending on shift alignment."}, {"title": "Instruction 4", "content": "Share the sample material set and next step note before closing the call."}]
jd_master.send_items: [{"order_no": 1, "label": "Profile Summary", "message": "Chat support, email handling, CRM tagging, and basic customer coordination.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 2, "label": "Candidate Checklist", "message": "Keep resume, Aadhaar, PAN, and one photo ready before the interview stage.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 3, "label": "Interview Flow", "message": "Initial screening, typing or communication check, and final HR call.", "link": ""}, {"order_no": 4, "label": "Recruitment Video", "message": "Use this sample video while checking the material buttons.", "link": "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=20TOjxiNppk"}]

mail_templates.title: Appreciation Mail
mail_templates.subject: Appreciation for your work
mail_templates.body:
Hi {{name}},

Great work on today's output. Keep the same energy going.

Regards,
{{sender_name}}

mail_templates.title: Morning Mail
mail_templates.subject: Morning plan for today
mail_templates.body:
Hi {{name}},

Please share your priority plan for today and keep the workflow updated.

Regards,
{{sender_name}}

mail_templates.title: Low Performance Mail
mail_templates.subject: Performance attention needed
mail_templates.body:
Hi {{name}},

Your recent output is below expectation. Please improve today and update the manager with blockers.

Regards,
{{sender_name}}

mail_templates.title: Document Submission Mail
mail_templates.subject: Submit documents today
mail_templates.body:
Hi {{name}},

Please submit the pending documents today so the process can move ahead.

Regards,
{{sender_name}}

mail_templates.title: Offer Letter Mail
mail_templates.subject: Offer letter and next steps
mail_templates.body:
Hello {{client_name}},

Sharing the current update and next steps from Career Crox.

Regards,
{{sender_name}}

yt_hub_playlists.title: Convincing Tricks • Daily Shorts
yt_hub_playlists.description: Quick daily shorts for pitch confidence, handling objections, and smoother candidate conversion.

yt_hub_playlists.title: Convincing Tricks • Practical Videos
yt_hub_playlists.description: Longer convincing videos for sales calls, negotiation flow, and objection handling.

yt_hub_playlists.title: Dark Psychology • Full Videos
yt_hub_playlists.description: Longer breakdowns on persuasion, social proof, urgency, and framing.

yt_hub_playlists.description: Short clips for polished office English, better wording, and smoother replies.

yt_hub_playlists.title: Advanced English • Videos
yt_hub_playlists.description: Longer English communication lessons for calls, interviews, and professional chat.

yt_hub_playlists.title: Phrasers • Shorts

yt_hub_playlists.title: Daily Use English • Videos
yt_hub_playlists.description: Practical spoken English videos for everyday office use.

yt_hub_playlists.title: Recruitment Mastery • Videos
yt_hub_playlists.description: Recruitment-focused videos for screening, pitching, follow-up discipline, and candidate control.

yt_hub_playlists.title: Funny Videos • Shorts

yt_hub_playlists.title: Stand-up Comedy • Videos
yt_hub_playlists.description: Stand-up and funny video references for break time.

yt_hub_playlists.title: Office Humor • Shorts
yt_hub_playlists.description: Office jokes, employee-manager humor, and relatable work clips.

yt_hub_playlists.description: Corporate and LinkedIn-ready video ideas for official page posting.
